Astro Static + React + Express API

AI Automation
Platform
Enterprise.

AxonQwen runs entirely on your device. Browser automation, visual analysis, smart scraping — powered by Qwen3.5, with no data leaving your machine. Built with Astro Static + Express.

▶ Get Started Open App →

What AxonQwen Does

All the Automation Tools You Need.

🌐

Browser RPA

Describe automation in natural language. Qwen3.5 vision reads the page and generates a complete Playwright script.

Playwright · Vision
🔍

Scraper Agent

Open any URL with real Chromium, extract structured JSON data from JS-rendered dynamic pages.

JSON · SPA · Pagination
🖼️

Vision Agent

Upload invoices, contracts, or any image. Qwen3.5 extracts all text, tables, and field values.

Multimodal · OCR
📡

Monitor Agent

Set up smart URL watchers with natural language conditions. Alerts sent via WebSocket instantly.

Cron · Alerts
⚡

Chat Agent

Streaming chat to your local Qwen3.5 model. Full history, custom prompts, and markdown rendering.

SSE · Markdown
📊

Reporter

Compile and summarize scraped data into professional reports in JSON or markdown.

Summarize · Format

Built-in Agents

Five Agents, One Platform.

01

Browser RPA Agent

Understands natural language and generates Playwright scripts. Combines vision and reasoning to navigate complex UIs.

Active
02

Scraper Agent

Loads any URL with real Chromium (handles JS-rendered SPAs), then uses Qwen3.5 to parse into clean JSON.

Active
03

Vision Agent

Send any image as base64. Qwen3.5 multimodal extracts all text, tables, and form fields — no external OCR needed.

Active
04

Monitor Agent

Schedule periodic URL checks with natural language trigger conditions. Alerts sent via WebSocket instantly.

Active
05

Chat Agent

Full streaming chat via API route → Ollama. Persistent memory through OpenClaw. Optional Telegram/Slack.

Active

API Reference

Express API Routes.
Standalone Server.

All endpoints are Express route handlers — pure TypeScript, running on a separate Node.js server. Frontend is served as static files.

GET /api/health Server health + uptime
GET /api/ollama/status Ollama connection + model list
POST /api/chat Streaming chat completion (SSE)
GET /api/tasks List all tasks (newest first)
DELETE /api/tasks/[id] Delete task record
POST /api/browser/run Browser RPA — Playwright task
POST /api/scraper/run Web scraping task
POST /api/vision/analyze Image analysis (base64)
POST /api/monitor/start Start URL monitor
GET /api/monitors List active monitors
DELETE /api/monitor/[id] Stop monitor

WebSocket — ws://localhost:4321/_ws

const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:4321/_ws');
ws.onmessage = ({ data }) => {
  const msg = JSON.parse(data);
  // msg.type: 'task_created' | 'task_updated' | 'task_result'
  //           'monitor_alert' | 'log' | 'connected'
};

Getting Started

Ready in 4 Steps.

AxonQwen requires Ollama as the local AI engine. Follow these steps to get started.

01

Install Ollama

Download and install Ollama from ollama.com. Available for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

# Windows (winget)
winget install Ollama.Ollama

# macOS (Homebrew)
brew install ollama

# Linux
curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
02

Run Ollama & Pull Model

After installing, run Ollama then download the Qwen 3.5 model. Keep Ollama running in the background.

# Run Ollama server (keep terminal open)
ollama serve

# Open new terminal, download model
ollama pull qwen3.5

# Verify model is installed
ollama list
03

Install Project Dependencies

Install npm packages and Chromium browser for Browser RPA and Scraper features.

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Install Chromium for Playwright
npx playwright install chromium
04

Run AxonQwen

Start the dev server. The dashboard will be available at http://localhost:4321/app.

# Run dev server
npm run dev

# Open browser
# → http://localhost:4321      (Landing Page)
# → http://localhost:4321/app  (Dashboard)

! Troubleshooting

Q:

Chat shows "fetch failed" error

Ollama is not running. Open a terminal and run ollama serve. Make sure the URL in Settings matches (default: http://localhost:11434).

Q:

Ollama is running but model not found

Pull the model first: ollama pull qwen3.5. Check available models with ollama list.

Q:

Dashboard is empty / "Server offline"

Make sure the dev server is running (npm run dev) and access via http://localhost:4321/app.

Q:

Browser RPA / Scraper error

Install Chromium browser: npx playwright install chromium.

Model Selection

Choose Your Qwen3.5 Model.

Model ID RAM Context
Qwen 3.5 7B qwen3.5:7b 8 GB 131K
Qwen 3.5 qwen3.5 10 GB 256K Recommended
Qwen 3.5 14B qwen3.5:14b 12 GB 256K
Qwen 3.5 27B qwen3.5:27b 20 GB 256K
Qwen 3.5 35B qwen3.5:35b 24 GB 256K
